import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { RouterModule } from '@angular/router'; import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon'; import { MatToolbarModule } from '@angular/material/toolbar'; @Component({ selector: 'app-header', standalone: true, imports: [ CommonModule, RouterModule, MatIconModule, MatToolbarModule, ], templateUrl: './header.component.html', styleUrl: './header.component.scss' }) export class HeaderComponent { }
